title: keysseria fasciculata
intro: Keysseria fasciculata, also known as Devil's Claw, is a plant species in the family Pedaliaceae, native to southern Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Keysseria fasciculata include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as improved digestion and immune system function. Herbal preparations of Devil's Claw can be found in the form of capsules, tablets, and teas, which can be used to treat conditions such as arthritis, muscle and joint pain, and digestive issues.
